# Modeling

**Summary**: The use of computational models to simulate molecular interactions.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2021-alkhowaildi|Alkhowaildi, 2021]] used modeling to study the behavior of substituted polysaccharides in fracturing fluids.

- [[2022-mustapha|Mustapha, 2022]] used WRF and AERMOD to model the effects of climate change on air quality.

## Instruments and Software



- [[2022-mustapha|Mustapha, 2022]] used WRF and AERMOD to model the effects of climate change on air quality.

- Simulated future scenarios showed that wind speed changes had a more significant impact than temperature changes. ([[2022-mustapha|Mustapha, 2022, p. 15]])
